completed_tasks.name: Scope v1.1 milestone (M3 Roaming + Windows Client) via questioning
Set planning granularity coarse -> balanced for correctness-sensitive roaming work
Update PROJECT.md (Current Milestone v1.1, Active reqs, Out of Scope reconciled), reset STATE.md, clear phase dirs
Archive v1.0 research to .planning/milestones/v1.0-research/ before overwrite
Stage full v1.1 research brief (4 researchers + synthesizer)

remaining_tasks.name: Run v1.1 research: spawn 4 gsd:gsd-project-researcher (Stack/Features/Architecture/Pitfalls) in parallel, then gsd:gsd-research-synthesizer for SUMMARY.md
Define REQUIREMENTS.md (REQ-IDs, scoped per category) from research + locked scope decisions
Spawn gsd:gsd-roadmapper to create v1.1 ROADMAP.md (continue phase numbering from v1.0's phase 3 -> start at phase 4)

decisions.decision: v1.1 scope = M3 roaming on Linux + a bounded Windows-client slice
decisions.rationale: Roaming is the next headline differentiator on the proven v1.0 foundation; native Windows server (ConPTY) stays M6 to avoid two hard unrelated problems in one milestone

decisions.decision: Session persistence = Mosh-style (survive until shell exits), configurable idle timeout default 0 (disabled), per-identity cap to bound memory
decisions.rationale: User preference matches Mosh; cap compensates for the disabled-by-default timeout on a network-facing daemon

decisions.decision: Cold reattach is 1-RTT, authorization bound to the authenticated SSH identity; 0-RTT stays deferred
decisions.rationale: Matches brief; 1-RTT dwarfed by Wi-Fi/DHCP bring-up; identity binding prevents session hijack

decisions.decision: Windows client signs from an on-disk OpenSSH key file (agent integration deferred); temporary Windows-only exception to 'never handle the private key' invariant; Linux ssh-agent path untouched
Roaming validated headless via forced path change; real Wi-Fi->cellular as a human-verified live check
decisions.rationale: Deterministic, automatable validation; live run confirms reality

decisions.decision: Granularity set to balanced for v1.1
decisions.rationale: Roaming has subtle ordering-dependent protocol bugs; finer plan-level checkpoints reduce risk vs the coarse v1.0 spike

next_action: Run the v1.1 research from .planning/RESEARCH-BRIEF-v1.1.md: spawn the 4 gsd:gsd-project-researcher agents in parallel (use the gsd: namespace prefix — bare names fail after the plugin reload), wait for all 4, then spawn gsd:gsd-research-synthesizer to write SUMMARY.md. Then continue to requirements -> roadmap.
context_notes: Mid /gsd:new-milestone for v1.1. Milestone setup (PROJECT.md/STATE.md/config) is committed. Research was deferred at the user's request so it can be triggered later via a one-liner. The research step previously errored ONLY because /reload-plugins re-registered GSD agents under the gsd: namespace mid-session; the staged brief hard-codes the prefixed agent names so the deferred run is unaffected. Roadmap should continue phase numbering (v1.0 ended at phase 3 -> v1.1 starts at phase 4); --reset-phase-numbers was NOT requested.
